briefdescription.para: SPI controller device.
SPI controller configuration.
SPI FRAM class destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: The initialization function of the SPI FRAM class.

detaileddescription.para:
The function initialize the private member variables spi_dev (SPI controller device) and spi_cfg (SPI controller configuration) by calling the functions getController and getConfig of the spibus instance spibus::inst(), Afterwards self test of the class will be performed by calling function selftest. In case of a failure an error message will be printed.
In Zephyr devicetree FRAM SPI is SPI bus 3.

briefdescription.para: Function to erase the content of the FRAM.

detaileddescription.para: Function initialize an array of size 1 KByte with 0 and write every this array into FRAM by calling function writeBytes 512 times.

briefdescription.para: Function to print the content of the FRAM in a terminal.

detaileddescription.para:
from
Start point of data to be printed
len
Length (number of bytes) of data to be printed
Function read every single byte from start point until end point (from + len) by calling function readBytes. After every call a short delay of 5 ms will be performed and the data will be printed out by call of macro LOG_PRINTK.

briefdescription.para: Function to read the device ID if the FRAM chip.

detaileddescription.para:
rc: 0 if no error, otherwise error code
The public method read device ID by calling the private member function read_device_id In case of a failure an error message will be printed.

briefdescription.para: Function to enter deep power down mode of FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return value of method dpd_enter (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function enters deep power down mode by calling private method dpd_enter.

briefdescription.para: Function to wake up FRAM from deep power down mode.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return value of method dpd_enter (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function returns from deep power down mode by calling private method dpd_exit.

briefdescription.para: Function to switch on FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return allways 0
Dummy implementation for compatibility with mram module

briefdescription.para: Function to switch off FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
returns return allways 0
Dummy implementation for compatibility with mram module

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the device ID.

detaileddescription.para:
returns the device ID as 8-bit unsigned interger pointer
Function returns a pointer to public array id[4].

briefdescription.para: Function to write multiple bytes into FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
addr
Startaddress for writing the data in FRAM
data
Pointer to array with the data to be written
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be written
returns return value of method write_bytes (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function writes num_bytes from array data into FRAM starting at address addr by calling private method write_bytes.

briefdescription.para: Function to read multiple bytes from FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
addr
Startaddress for reading the data from FRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be read
returns return value of method read_bytes (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function read num_bytes into array data from FRAM starting at address addr by calling private method read_bytes.

briefdescription.para: The inst function to retrieve the exclusiv only instance of the class.

detaileddescription.para:
Returns a pointer to the class instance
In case there is no instance created, the constructor will be called to create the instance. Finally a pointer to the instance is returned.

briefdescription.para: SPI FRAM class constructor.

detaileddescription.para: The constructor is declared as private according to singleton pattern. It is called in the static inst function to create the exclusiv only instance of the class. It initializes the private member variable dpd_active with false.

briefdescription.para: Function to enter deep power down mode of FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
returns 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function initializes transmit buffer, set the enter deep power down OP code command MB85SR4MTY_DPD_CMD and pass transmit buffer to FRAM by calling function spi_write. In case of success the private member variable dpd_active is set to true and the function returns 0 for success indication. In case of an error function returns error code EIO. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 7.

briefdescription.para: Function to wake up FRAM from deep power down mode.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
returns 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function wakes up FRAM by pulling Chip Select CS to low and after a delay of 10 usec to high. In case of an error function returns error code EIO.Afterwards a dummy read of one byte is performed at address 0 og FRAM by calling function readBytes. Finally the private member variable dpd_active is set to false and function returns 0 for success indication. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 22.

briefdescription.para: Function to read the device ID from FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
returns return value of method spi_transceive (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function initializes transmit and receive buffer, set the read Device ID OP code command MB85RS4MTY_MANUFACTURER_ID_CMD and read the device ID by calling function spi_transceive. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 7 for OP code commands and page 11 for device ID.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint8_t cmd, uint32_t addr, void *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: fram_access

briefdescription.para: Function to access FRAM for reading and writing.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
cmd
OP code command
addr
Startaddress for reading or writing the data from / in FRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read or to be written
len
Number of bytes to be read or to be written
returns return value of method spi_transceive in case of reading or of method spi_write in case of writing (0 no error, otherwise error code)
Function initializes transmit buffer an set the OP code command cmd and start address in array access. In case of reading the receive buffer is initialized and read the data by calling function spi_transceive. In case of writing the data will be written by calling function spi_write. Finally the return value of function spi_transceive or spi_write will be returned to calling function. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 7.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint32_t addr, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_bytes)
memberdef.name: write_bytes

briefdescription.para: Function to write multiple bytes to FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
addr
Startaddress for writing the data in FRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be written
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be written
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function enable writing by calling function fram_access with OP code command MB85RS4MTY_WRITE_ENABLE_CMD. In case of an error function returns immediately with error code EIO, otherwise the data will be written by calling function fram_access with OP code command MB85RS4MTY_WRITE_CMD. In case of an error function returns error code EIO, otherwise returns 0 for indication success. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 7.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *spi, struct spi_config *spi_cfg, uint32_t addr, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_bytes)
memberdef.name: read_bytes

briefdescription.para: Function to read multiple bytes to FRAM.

detaileddescription.para:
spi
Pointer to the SPI device node identifier of type struct device
spi_cfg
Pointer to the SPI controller configuration structure of type struct spi_config
addr
Startaddress for reading the data from FRAM
data
Pointer to array for the data to be read
num_bytes
Number of bytes to be read
returns return 0 on success, otherwise error code
Function read the data calling function fram_access with OP code command MB85RS4MTY_READ_CMD. In case of an error function returns error code EIO, otherwise returns 0 for success indication. See MB85RS4MTY data sheet, page 7.

briefdescription.para: SPI FRAM class implemented according to C++ singleton design pattern.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The SPI FRAM class handle the storage of the acceleration raw data in FRAM. It provides methods to initialize and erase FRAM, to read and write the data, to push FRAM into power saving mode or release from it, to dump the data and to read and ship the devcie ID. Furthermore it provides a private method to test the integrity of the FRAM at startup of the system.
